title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.537 - County foster parent associations may be established, duties of division
text:
210.537.  County foster parent associations may be established, duties of division. — The children's division shall cooperate with and shall help promote foster parent associations in each county.  The children's division shall provide county foster parent associations with data, information and guidelines on the obligations, responsibilities and opportunities of foster parenting and shall keep the associations and members apprised of changes in laws and regulations relevant to foster parenting.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1370, et al. § 8, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
